use_cases: Primary call-to-action button with colorful gradient effects for SaaS landing pages
Engaging button component with hover glow transitions for marketing sites
Dark-themed gradient button for e-commerce product pages and checkout flows
Interactive CTA element with blur and opacity animations for portfolio sites
Accent button with liquid glass aesthetic for creative tool interfaces
ai_summary: A colorful gradient button component featuring a multi-hue gradient (indigo-purple-pink) with blur effects and opacity transitions on hover. The button supports dark/light themes with automatic color inversion and includes an arrow icon. Designed as an atomic interactive element with glass-morphism inspired aesthetics, suitable for SaaS landing pages, e-commerce sites, and creative tool interfaces as a primary CTA.
